title: Language Modeling Path
description: Build fluency in Language Modeling inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Sequence Modeling
steps.summary: Sequence Modeling belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Sequence-to-Sequence Models. It opens into Sequence Masked Modeling and Offline Sequence Modeling.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Causal Language Modeling
steps.summary: Causal Language Modeling belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Language Modeling and Language Models. It opens into Causal Language Modeling Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Sequence-to-sequence learning
steps.summary: Sequence-to-sequence learning belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Reinforcement learning for sequence generation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Context Window
steps.summary: Context Window belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Compare it with Sequence-To-Sequence Parser and Sequence-to-sequence learning. It opens into Context Window Shrink and Context window budgeting.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Mamba Sequence Models
steps.summary: Mamba Sequence Models belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Mamba and Mamba-2.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Sequence Labeling
steps.summary: Sequence Labeling belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Sequence-to-Sequence Models. It opens into Parsing as Sequence Labeling.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Sequence parallelism
steps.summary: Sequence parallelism belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after Model Parallelism and Sequence-to-Sequence Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: RWKV Sequence Models
steps.summary: RWKV Sequence Models belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Language Modeling. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Language Modeling. Start after RWKV and Sequence-to-Sequence Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
